examples: One day I found a litter of wild kittens in our woodpile.
The boys behind the woodpile shot one of the men on horseback .
He'd climbed into the woodpile in front of hundreds of kids, pulled out the barriers and left.
He sat on the stump like a little person, fascinated by what was happening beyond the woodpile on the opposite side of the clearing.
It wasn't a fancy piece of wood, just a regular woodpile log, the kind you might put in your stove or fireplace to stoke a fire and heat your room.
